## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to align on content strategy, review progress, and establish new workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting focus to new content pipeline using updated artifacts and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Establishing clear cadence for keyword approval, outline reviews, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Improving content management in Airtable as single source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Addressing feedback on repetitive content and aligning on monthly product update check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline Status

  - [Four existing articles under review: workload IAM vs API security, Kubernetes, and two others](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Apurva has reviewed three, Ashur commented on one](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Team to push for publishing these articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [New content creation process prioritized over older content](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)

### Artifact and Workflow Updates

  - [Company context and persona artifacts reviewed by Apurva, minor edits implemented](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [New workflow established:](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - [Keywords sent via Slack for approval](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
      - [Outlines drafted by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Team review on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [Content creation the following week](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Content Management Improvements

  - [Transitioning to Airtable as single source of truth for content status](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Adding new statuses specific to Aembit team's approval process](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Ehtisham to work with David on revising statuses and confirming with Dan](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

### Feedback and Adjustments

  - [Addressing repetitive content issue in older articles](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Monthly check-in on product launches to be added to the process](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Clarification on editing process: direct edits or comments both acceptable](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### Expert Interviews

  - [Darrell scheduling and conducting interviews with Aembit team members](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Two more interviews to be arranged with CTO and sales engineer](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Send new batch of keywords via Slack for approval](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)

  - [Aembit team to review outlines on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Update Airtable with clear statuses and owners for content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Review and finalize artifacts based on Apurva's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Ehtisham to revise content management process with David and confirm with Dan](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Set up monthly product launch update check-in](https://fathom.video/share/SvX2nkqet32rp_45Y9qeiduDC6zzPiat?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
